Industry News.title: Predicting AI job exposure
Industry News.summary:
Many people would like to analyse which jobs, companies and industries are 
most exposed to AI, and assign scores, build charts, and map that against 
the progress of LLMs. I think this is mostly impossible: you don’t know how 
the jobs will change, you don’t know what else will change around this, and 
you can’t measure work like that anyway.
